description: Example portrait avatar (img2img over a reference image) - never gonna give this preset up. Preconfigured for the DreamShaper_8 SD1.5 checkpoint with a reference frame of a certain 1987 music video. To make your own character: (1) drop in a real reference portrait as the reference_image, (2) set ckpt_name in example_avatar.workflow.json to a checkpoint you have installed, (3) rewrite base_positive/base_negative to describe that character. 'denoise' below is only the fallback used for any expression that doesn't set its own denoise in the vocabulary (see vocabularies/expressions.json).
base_positive: portrait of a cheerful man with a wavy reddish-brown pompadour hairstyle, warm smile, tan trench coat over a black shirt, blue-lit brick wall background, 1980s music video style, headshot, sharp focus
base_negative: blurry, low quality, deformed, disfigured, extra limbs, text, watermark, signature
